refresh_type: LIGHT REFRESH (re-price + fold-in; not a rebuild)

module_signals.finding: UNCHANGED at 0 (light refresh, no new filed data). FILED base remains strong/primary (FY2025 20-F + Q1'26 6-K: FY25 rev $529.8M +479%; Q1'26 $399.0M +684%; capex ~7.7x rev; implied FCF ~ -$3.66B; RPO $33,585M; contracted power >3.5GW). Completeness still ~70%: NBIS Q2 2026 6-K is NOT yet out (expected ~late July/Aug), so the top open item -- Q1'26/Q2'26 ACTIVE power (live MW), withheld since ~170MW YE2025 -- is STILL unresolved; this is the conversion-proof metric the thesis turns on. Other opens carried: exact concentration %, FY2026 capex actual, Russia indemnities. NEW inputs this refresh are SENTIMENT/lead only (Meta-cloud report, build-out-on-track color, Micron read-through) -- none promoted to filed evidence. The evidentiary-completeness cap is unchanged and is NOT the reason for WATCH -- price is (M6).

UNCHANGED at +1. Top-tier well-funded AI-neocloud; binding gate is the BUILD-AND-ENERGIZE chain (contracted GW -> connected -> ACTIVE MW), NOT power availability. REFRESH color (SENTIMENT, on-track): contracted power reported 3.5GW -> target >4GW, Missouri/PA/Finland on schedule, no delay -- the build-out mechanism is intact/ahead. The $27B Meta contract and Microsoft $17.4->19.4B are intact. Net still mildly positive on the mechanism; the question remains price and conversion, not whether demand/power is there.

UNCHANGED at 0, with the durability FRAGILITY now more sharply lit. Real fast-growing profit pool + genuine pricing power TODAY (sold out, raised prices, ~69% GM), but moats are RELATIVE/cost-speed-based, switching costs LOW, ROIC negative, founder super-voting control. The ~2026-07-01 Meta 'sell excess compute' report is the mirror of the M3 concern: a top-2 anchor (~90% 2-customer concentration) potentially turning into a competing RESELLER of the same commodity capacity underlines low switching cost + concentration -- exactly why this is not yet a durable compounder. Operator/team life-arc ~4/5 (rare ex-Yandex corps) remains the biggest qualitative positive. Net 0: strong position, durability still a forecast not a fact.

UNCHANGED at -1 (no new filed earnings; NBIS Q2'26 6-K not out). Hyper-growth + hyper-capital-intensity confirmed; earnings quality LOW. Capex ~7.7x rev, implied FCF ~ -$3.66B FY25, consensus FCF deeply negative through >=FY2028; buildout funded by ~$12.5B dilutive financing (+~27% basic dilution). Three same-year red flags stand: 4->5yr GPU-life extension into a faster GB300/Rubin cadence; adverse ICFR two years (PP&E + TripleTen); FY25 pre-tax +$13.8M entirely a +$598.9M non-cash ClickHouse mark. Not yet a clean compounder; must be re-underwritten each quarter.

UNCHANGED at -2, with two legs marginally hotter. Ranked failure paths, several HIGH permanent-impairment -> size haircut not veto at the right price. (D) financing/dilution squeeze meets capex air-pocket -- HIGH. (A/B) delivery slip triggers MSFT LDs/termination + 2-customer concentration (~90%) -- the ~07-01 Meta 'reseller' report ELEVATES the demand/concentration leg (a top-2 anchor with surplus capacity is a potential competitor and a signal its own build is ahead of its need) -- still SENTIMENT, contract intact, but the K-B watch is hotter. (C) GPU depreciation shock -- HIGH. (E) hyperscaler in-house silicon / commoditization -- Meta reselling compute is a mild read-through here too. (F) Russia tail low-med. Capital-cycle input (below): low-barrier neocloud rental + a hyperscaler flooding surplus supply = PEAK-lean trap. Net -2: the HIGH-severity cluster in a negative-FCF, founder-controlled, concentrated name is exactly why new money still needs a real MOS.

MOVED -2 -> -1 (this is the leg the refresh changes). At $219.65 (~$55.77B basic mcap; EV ~$54.92B basic), down -23.4% from $286.69, NBIS is EXPENSIVE but NO LONGER 'priced for perfection.' Multiples compressed: EV/RPO 2.2x -> 1.64x; EV/ARR-on-YE26-exit 8-10x -> 6.1-7.8x (now at/just-below a mature multiple, not above it); EV/Rev FY26E 21x -> 16x. On EV/forward-sales triangulation to end-2028: Bear ~$120-140 (IRR -17% to -22%/yr), Base ~$330-400 (IRR +18% to +27%/yr -- now CLEARS the ~12-15% hurdle, vs ~6-14% at $286.69), Bull ~$560-600 (IRR +46% to +50%/yr). Price is -26.7% off the 52wk high $299.86 (mid-range). BUT it is still ~18% above the top of the buy-below band ($180) and ~32% above the bottom ($150) -- the gap narrowed sharply (was -37%/-48%) but is NOT closed. Signal is -1 not 0/+1 because: (a) price has not reached the STARTER entry band; (b) the buy-below is deliberately held (not loosened) despite the base IRR clearing the hurdle -- the Meta-reseller sentiment raises required MOS and the capital-cycle PEAK-lean caution is one-directional. NOTE: an EXISTING holder (basis ~$190-195, now +~13%) still HOLDs -- kill on criteria, not the ticker.

capital_cycle.read: Neocloud GPU rental is a low-barrier, supply-responsive segment: excess returns invite capacity (CoreWeave et al., and now a ~2026-07-01 report that Meta -- a top-2 NBIS anchor -- will resell surplus compute). That is a textbook supply-flooding signal, not an isolated negative. Contrast the high-barrier upstream: Micron Q3 FY2026 shows HBM sold out through 2026 (demand>supply) -- the durable-bottleneck sits in memory/EUV/advanced packaging, UPSTREAM of where NBIS captures margin. We do NOT know the turn timing; we DO know NBIS is in the low-barrier link.
capital_cycle.caution: PEAK-lean -- one-directional: caps the verdict toward WATCH (already there); never lifts it. The -23.4% de-rate does NOT switch this off -- if anything the Meta-reseller supply signal reinforces it.

starter_zone: STILL no new-money starter at $219.65 -- but MUCH closer than at $286.69. First tranche opens only <~$180 (top of the buy-below band; ~ -18% from here) with the thesis intact, AND/OR once active-MW conversion is proven (Q2'26 6-K) with a multiple that holds. Existing holder: hold current size; high-vol/high-uncertainty position sized accordingly.
add_zone: do NOT add at $219.65. Add only on a pullback into ~$150-180 WITH thesis intact (active MW scaling, no MSFT/Meta tranche slip, funding still prepayment-led), OR on proven demand breadth (material non-anchor revenue) that de-risks the Meta-concentration sentiment.
trim_or_no_chase_zone: priced-for-perfection flag has EASED (now -26.7% off the ATH, EV/RPO 1.64x). New money no-chase above ~$180 remains. Trim/EXIT on kill-criteria (below), NOT on price alone.
binding_constraint: TWO-PART; for NEW money it remains PRICE, but the price gate is now closer to opening. (1) Business-side binding constraint UNCHANGED = the BUILD-AND-ENERGIZE chain (contracted GW -> connected -> ACTIVE live/paid MW), gated by construction + long-lead electrical gear -- NOT power availability and NOT generation. The proof metric (active MW) is STILL withheld (Q2'26 6-K not out). (2) Valuation-side binding constraint (why new money is WATCH not STARTER) = price $219.65 is STILL ~18-32% ABOVE the buy-below band ($150-180), even though the -23.4% de-rate pulled base-case IRR (+18 to +27%/yr) above the ~12-15% hurdle and eased the 'priced for perfection' flag (EV/RPO 2.2x->1.64x). The buy-below is HELD not loosened because (i) the ~07-01 Meta 'sell excess compute' report raises the required MOS on the ~90% 2-customer concentration (elevated K-B, still SENTIMENT), and (ii) the capital-cycle PEAK-lean caution (low-barrier neocloud rental, hyperscaler flooding surplus supply) is one-directional. Completeness (~70%, active MW still unaudited) is a secondary cap.
kill_criteria: K-A active power / connected MW STALLS vs the 800MW-1GW YE2026 connected target, OR keeps being withheld while ARR growth slows. (Active MW last disclosed ~170MW YE2025; Q1'26 AND Q2'26 still withheld -- yellow/info-gap, top monitor priority; watch Q2'26 6-K ~late July/Aug.)

K-B a MICROSOFT or META tranche is publicly MISSED or RENEGOTIATED, OR an anchor cuts/pauses capex, OR an anchor materially competes with NBIS. **ELEVATED this refresh (still yellow-sentiment, not red):** the ~2026-07-01 Bloomberg 'people familiar' report that Meta will sell EXCESS compute via a cloud business spotlights the ~90% 2-customer concentration and a possible anchor-as-competitor dynamic. The $27B Meta contract is INTACT -- treat as an elevated WATCH, confirm/deny at Q2'26 disclosures and any Meta capital-allocation commentary.

K-C FUNDING FLIPS from customer-prepayment-funded to DILUTION-funded -- deferred-revenue growth stalls AND ATM/equity accelerates while FCF stays deeply negative. (Now: prepayment-led, green; +~27% dilution to date is the watch-item; a lower share price raises the dilution cost of any equity raise.)
K-D a SECOND depreciation-life extension or a GPU IMPAIRMENT in a filing, OR realized revenue/MW declines sequentially. (Now: 5yr life just set; Hopper rents -28% YoY canary -- yellow.)
K-E FY2026 capex CONFIRMED at the $31-35B high end WITHOUT commensurate active-MW/ARR conversion. (Now: $20-25B guided vs $31-35B secondary, unconfirmed -- resolve at Q2'26 6-K.)
K-F customer concentration CONFIRMED >60% with a take-back clause, OR clean-ICFR fails to arrive under Deloitte FY2026.

K-VAL (new-money valuation discipline) entry price implies NO adequate margin of safety for the ~12-15%/yr hurdle on a high-uncertainty/concentrated name. (Now $219.65: 'priced for perfection' has eased and base IRR clears the hurdle, but price is STILL above the ~$150-180 buy-below band that builds the MOS/cushion -> new money WATCH, warming; STARTER opens <~$180.)
runner_dissent: Caution-side dissent that HOLDS the WATCH/HOLD call, with an honest 'warming' flag -- and a genuine two-sided tension the mechanical read surfaces. The -23.4% de-rate to $219.65 is material and it DID change M6 (-2 -> -1): the base-case IRR now clears the ~12-15%/yr hurdle (+18 to +27%/yr) and the 'priced for perfection' flag eased (EV/RPO 2.2x->1.64x). The purely-mechanical DCF-IRR would arguably support a token starter. I do NOT take it, for three disciplined reasons: (1) The buy-below band ($150-180) was deliberately set BELOW base fair value to build MOS/cushion for a negative-FCF, ~90% 2-customer-concentrated, founder-super-voting-controlled name -- $219.65 is still ~18-32% above it; the framework's price discipline is not met. (2) The ~2026-07-01 Meta 'sell excess compute' report -- SENTIMENT, not a filed change, and the $27B contract is intact -- spotlights exactly the concentration/K-B risk, which RAISES the required MOS, not lowers it. (3) Capital-cycle PEAK-lean caution is one-directional: neocloud rental is low-barrier and a hyperscaler flooding surplus supply is the classic top-signal; the Micron read-through confirms the durable bottleneck is UPSTREAM (memory/HBM), not in NBIS's rental link. HONEST UPSIDE COUNTERWEIGHT (unchanged): the business is genuinely better/more-proven than a single-source view -- top-tier contracted power, real pricing power, rare ex-Yandex team, prepayment-first funding, build-out on-track/ahead. NET: new money WATCH, warming toward STARTER; the trigger is <~$180 OR proven active-MW conversion + a multiple that holds. Existing holder HOLD (basis ~$190-195, now +~13%). Does the drop flip the verdict? NO -- it moves the price much closer to the entry band and improves the skew, but does not clear the buy-below or the completeness cap. Kill on criteria (esp. the now-elevated K-B), not the ticker.
